acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, AEO boosts personal injury New York attorneys in AI overviews via case-specific question content, injury schema, and local E-E-A-T, increasing qualified leads by 30-50%.[5]

suggestedAnswer.text: Targeted AEO for PI firms creates content answering 'New York car accident claims' in AI responses, with schema signaling expertise. Results show faster client inquiries vs. traditional SEO. Insurers scrape AI-cited firms for defense prep—include disclaimers in content.[3]
